name: waichat
description: Your own AI chat app, deployed in one click on Cloudflare's free tier.

scripts.build: pnpm build:assets && npx wrangler deploy && node scripts/patch-db-id.mjs && pnpm db:migrate:binding
scripts.deploy:production: pnpm build:assets && pnpm db:migrate:remote && wrangler deploy -c wrangler.local.jsonc
scripts.db:migrate:local: wrangler d1 migrations apply waichat-db --local -c wrangler.local.jsonc
scripts.db:migrate:remote: wrangler d1 migrations apply waichat-db --remote -c wrangler.local.jsonc
scripts.db:migrate:binding: npx wrangler d1 migrations apply DB --remote

author: Rana Jahanzaib
